message:
fix(tmux): use /tmp for socket directory instead of os.TempDir()

On macOS, os.TempDir() returns /var/folders/.../T/ but tmux always puts
sockets in /tmp/tmux-<uid>/. This caused findTestSockets() to scan the
wrong directory, making TestFindTestSockets_Integration fail.

Add tmux.SocketDir() helper and use it everywhere instead of ad-hoc
path construction with os.TempDir() or hardcoded /tmp.

Closes gt-qz93

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
